/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/RecordingEngine.dir/main.cpp.o -o bin/RecordingEngine  -lFFMPEG_avcodec_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND -lFFMPEG_avformat_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND -lFFMPEG_avutil_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND -lFFMPEG_swscale_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND -lIMGUI_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND -ld3d11 -ld3d12 -ldxgi -ldxguid -lole32 -loleaut32 -lavrt -lwinmm -limm32 -lversion /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
